sections.text: Enter your Gladly API credentials below. You can generate an API token in Gladly under Settings > API Tokens.

sections.label: Gladly Host
sections.hint: Your Gladly instance hostname (e.g. us-1.gladly.com or us-uat.gladly.qa)

sections.label: Username
sections.hint: Email address of a Gladly user with API permissions

sections.label: API Token
sections.hint: Found in Settings > API Tokens in Gladly
